whatsNew: Added dedicated Unreal Engine Animation Scanner support for both .uasset and .ueasset file extensions!
Implemented automated metadata extraction for animation assets, retrieving file size, modification date, bones/skeleton name, frame counts, FPS, and locomotion category.
Created a dedicated 'AnimData' local database storage to cache scanned animations and prevent repetitive heavy disk parsing.
Added individual asset Rescan controls allowing users to force-update specific animations on demand.
improvements: Integrated the high-performance multi-column layout for Unreal Animations with lazy-loaded grid elements.
Refined sidebar navigation with a new Unreal Animation Library view, fully independent of the 3D and 2D sections.
Enhanced file scanner logging to show animation-specific parsing information in real-time.
fixes: Fixed a React lazy-loading issue on grid elements where card visual offsets could occur under rapid scroll.
Resolved import resolution warnings for motion/react layout wrappers.
